object.name: InputRichBlockMap
object.description: A block with a map, corresponding to the custom HTML tag <tg-map>. The map's width and height must not exceed 10000 in total. The width and height ratio must be at most 20.
object.html_description: A block with a map, corresponding to the custom HTML tag <tg-map>. The map's width and height must not exceed 10000 in total. The width and height ratio must be at most 20.
object.rst_description: A block with a map, corresponding to the custom HTML tag :code:`<tg-map>`. The map's width and height must not exceed 10000 in total. The width and height ratio must be at most 20.

annotations.description: Location of the center of the map
annotations.html_description: Location of the center of the map
annotations.rst_description: Location of the center of the map
annotations.name: location
